name: article_text
description: The operative text of the article — the durable rule, boundary, or commitment.

aiGuidance.purpose: Capture the exact wording of the article as agreed by the group. This text is authoritative.
aiGuidance.extraction: Transcribe or draft the precise operative language. Use plain sentences. Avoid procedural preamble.
aiGuidance.negativeGuidance: Do not include rationale, history, or context here. Those belong in separate fields.
